name: Visual China Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Visual China Group Co.,Ltd. operates an Internet platform that offers copyrighted professionally generated content (PGC) and value-added services to content producers and users in China. Its platform offers PGC images, videos, and musical materials. The company also provides commissioned shooting, photo agency, visual and integrated marketing, rights clearance, and creative collection services. Visual China Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Beijing, China.
